attractions.name: McLeod Ganj
attractions.description: Vibrant town called Little Lhasa, lined with Tibetan handicraft shops, monasteries, bakeries, and cafés with strong Tibetan cultural influence
source_files: North India/Mr. Amit Sinkar- North India- All Inclusive Guide.docx

attractions.name: Bhagsu Nag Temple
attractions.description: Historic temple over 500 years old dedicated to Lord Shiva, surrounded by beautiful mountain landscapes with sacred pool
source_files: North India/Mr. Amit Sinkar- North India- All Inclusive Guide.docx

attractions.name: Bhagsu Waterfall
attractions.description: Beautiful waterfall cascading down rocky cliffs surrounded by charming cafés overlooking the valley
source_files: North India/Mr. Amit Sinkar- North India- All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Tibetan Momos
local_dishes.description: Steamed dumplings filled with vegetables or chicken, served with spicy dipping sauce
source_files: North India/Mr. Amit Sinkar- North India- All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Thukpa
local_dishes.description: Comforting Tibetan noodle soup made with vegetables or chicken, perfect for cool mountain climate
